summary: Global attention remains fixed on Iran-US negotiations, with both sides claiming a ceasefire deal is "never been closer" while Trump dismisses leaked terms as fake, amid broader regional tensions affecting shipping lanes and neighboring conflicts. SpaceX has made its market debut with Elon Musk positioned to become the world's first trillionaire, marking a major corporate milestone. The UK is moving to sever energy ties with Russia by year's end while contending with economic contraction, as broader geopolitical realignments reshape European security and trade. Meanwhile, conflicts from Israel-Palestine to India-Pakistan persist alongside humanitarian crises, including Ebola spread in Congo and military draft protests in Israel.
